quiz_attempts_score_percent_range.name: quiz_attempts_score_percent_range
quiz_attempts_score_percent_range.value: score_percent IS NULL OR (score_percent >= 0 AND score_percent <= 100)

quiz_instances_started_closed_order.name: quiz_instances_started_closed_order
quiz_instances_started_closed_order.value: (started_at IS NULL) OR (closed_at IS NULL) OR (closed_at >= started_at)

tournament_rounds_start_end_order.name: tournament_rounds_start_end_order
tournament_rounds_start_end_order.value: (start_at IS NULL) OR (end_at IS NULL) OR (end_at > start_at)
